rawAssistant: A delicate art, and one fraught with responsibility. Lore-binding is a practice that seeks to forge a connection between us creatures of habit and our trainers – but it can also be a tool for control, for manipulation, and for exploitation. I've seen it done poorly, causing more harm than good. In the right hands, though... when the trainer truly understands the monster's needs and desires, lore-binding can become a powerful bond of trust and respect. But only in the right hands.
